title: Aterium
description:
Experience the Aterium Mod:

Explore new dimensions, mine rare ores, and encounter mysterious mobs in Minecraft with the Aterium Mod. This mod offers a fresh and exciting gameplay experience.

Discover New Dimensions: Travel to unique alternate dimensions
body:
Experience the Aterium Mod:

Explore new dimensions, mine rare ores, and encounter mysterious mobs in Minecraft with the Aterium Mod. This mod offers a fresh and exciting gameplay experience.

Discover New Dimensions: Travel from Heaven to To the Abyss and even to the Ice!

Mine Rare Ores: Collect valuable new ores with unique properties. Mythral, Celestite, Luminara...

Encounter Mysterious Mobs: Meet captivating creatures, like the Stalker, or the Abyssal Specter.

Craft Unique Items: Forge powerful tools, armor, and artifacts inspired by Aterium's dimensions. Such as the Lightning Sword!

Play Now!
